tools.name: movscript_create_draft
tools.description: Create a local runtime/client review artifact for compatibility or explicitly granted debug workflows. Page-owned product flows should create draft shells before agent runs.

tools.name: movscript_read_draft
tools.description: Read one local draft file by path before editing it.

tools.name: movscript_list_drafts
tools.description: List local runtime/client review artifacts for the current or specified project. Use to review previous agent proposals before any backend write flow.

tools.name: movscript_edit_draft
tools.description: Edit a local draft file by replacing a unique old string with a new string.

tools.name: movscript_dry_apply_draft
tools.description: Validate a local draft file and run backend apply preview without writing permanent project data.

tools.name: movscript_request_user_input
tools.description: Pause the current agent run and ask the user for missing context, a choice, confirmation, or free-form input. Use this when the next step would be a guess.

tools.name: movscript_create_script
tools.description: Create a formal script record in the current project after user approval. Use this only when the user wants the generated script saved into the project.
